big_idea: Government must force the transition off fossil fuels (no new coal/gas, 75% by 2030)
Tax billionaires and big corporations to fund public services
End offshore detention, raise refugee intake to 50,000, permanent visas
Freeze and cap rents; public developer builds homes
Cut military spending, redirect funds to diplomacy and foreign aid
Cancel the AUKUS nuclear-submarine deal with the US and UK
Stronger worker rights: multi-employer bargaining, same job same pay, right to disconnect
Strengthen Medicare: 90% bulk-billing, $25 PBS scripts
Limit negative gearing to new builds only (no writing off rental losses on established homes)
Scrap the 50% CGT discount; 30% minimum tax on gains across all assets, small-business carve-outs
Subsidise green industries via production tax credits (Future Made in Australia)
Cut all student (HELP) debt 20%, lift repayment threshold, fee-free TAFE
Three-Day childcare guarantee, abolish activity test, toward universal childcare
Give the media regulator power to make platforms manage seriously harmful misinformation
Require platforms to stop under-16s holding social-media accounts (age-verification)
Firm borders: offshore processing, turnbacks, detention/removal
Permanently index income-tax thresholds to inflation to end bracket creep (Tax Back Guarantee)
$50k small-business instant asset write-off and cut government spending
Dedicated national fund banks resource windfalls to pay down public debt (Future Generations Fund)
Scrap net zero/2030 targets, back coal and gas
Lift the federal ban on nuclear power and build nuclear plants
Let first-home buyers withdraw up to $50k of super for a deposit
Roll back Labor's IR laws: scrap right to disconnect, multi-employer bargaining, same job same pay
Cap visas at ~130,000 a year (no current overall cap; ~185k permanent limit)
Oppose 'gender ideology'; keep it out of schools; bar trans women from women's sport/spaces
Wind back Indigenous-specific agencies, programs and recognition; treat everyone the same
Oppose vaccine mandates; defend medical freedom; royal commission into the pandemic response
Enshrine free speech in the Constitution as a protected right
Introduce Citizen Initiated Referenda — binding national votes on laws citizens propose
Income splitting — tax couples as one household on their combined income
